notes: Nucleoprotein scaffold; classic FFPE canary — long, expressed in every cell, not a cancer driver
Cytoplasmic dynein heavy chain — ubiquitous trafficking, biology-neutral
BIR-repeat apoptosis regulator — broadly expressed, not a driver
Beta-actin — short, abundant, classic FFPE-stable reference
RPL13 — low-variance ribosomal reference (replaces B2M which is immune-regulated)
